title: AMQSMP-ClientPack
description: This client-side modpack is designed as an optional enhancement for players on the AMQ Minecraft Server.
body:
# **AMQSMP Client Pack**
This client-side modpack is designed as an optional enhancement for players on the AMQ Minecraft Server. While not required, it provides a vast array of improvements to performance, visuals, and gameplay, making the overall experience smoother and more enjoyable. Whether you're looking for better FPS, UI upgrades, or additional multiplayer features, this pack ensures a more optimized and immersive way to play.

It adds:
## Performance & Optimization
- **Sodium** – A must-have performance mod that drastically improves FPS and rendering efficiency. Essential for smooth gameplay.

- **Lithium** – Optimizes game physics, AI, and chunk loading, making the game run more efficiently.

- **Krypton** – Enhances network performance, reducing lag spikes caused by multiplayer connections.

- **FerriteCore** – Reduces memory usage by optimizing how blocks and entities are stored in RAM.

- **ImmediatelyFast** – Speeds up UI rendering, making menus and inventories feel more responsive.

- **ModernFix** – Focuses on memory optimizations, making modded Minecraft more stable.

## Quality of Life & UI Enhancements
- **Jade** – An information mod that displays details about blocks, entities, and items when hovering over them.
- **Mod Menu** – Adds an easy-to-use interface to manage installed mods in Fabric.

- **BetterF3** – Upgrades the F3 debug screen with a more organized and customizable layout.

- **Xaero's World Map** – Provides an in-game world map, useful for navigation.

- **Roughly Enough Items (REI)** – A must-have for browsing crafting recipes in-game.

- **AppleSkin** – Adds detailed food and hunger information to the UI.

- **Pick Up Notifier** – Displays recently picked-up items in a notification-style pop-up. 
  
- **Dark Loading Screen** – Changes the game’s loading screen to a darker theme.

- **Item Highlighter & Item Borders** – Improves the visibility of items in inventories.

- **Inventory Essentials** – Improves inventory management with sorting and search features.
## Graphics & Visual Improvements
- **Iris Shaders** – Allows shader packs to be used, enhancing visuals with lighting and shadows.

- **Complementary Shaders - Reimagined** – A high-quality shader pack included with the modpack.

- **Continuity** – Adds connected textures and smooth transitions for better-looking blocks.

- **Enhanced Block Entities** – Optimizes and improves the performance of tile entities like chests.

- **Distant Horizons** – Implements LOD (Level of Detail) rendering, allowing players to see far beyond normal render distances.

## Multiplayer & Communication
- **Simple Voice Chat** – Enables proximity-based voice chat in multiplayer.

- **Replay Voice Chat** – Works with ReplayMod to capture in-game voice chat during replays.

- **Chat Heads** – Displays player heads next to messages in chat for better identification.

- **Chat Patches & Chat Notify** – Improves chat functionality and adds notifications for new messages.

## Gameplay & Customization
- **Trimmable Tools & Better Trims** – Expands Minecraft’s armor and tool customization.

- **AdvancementInfo Reloaded** – Enhances the advancements UI for better tracking.

- **Enchantment Level Cap Indicator** – Shows the maximum enchantment level on an item.


## Misc
- **Jake's Build Tools** – Adds useful building utilities and tools.
- **Sound Physics Remastered** – Adds realistic 3D sound propagation, making caves and enclosed areas sound more immersive.
- **Spark** – A performance profiling tool that helps diagnose lag issues.

- **Extreme Sound Muffler** – Lets you adjust or mute specific in-game sounds for a better audio experience.
